metadata.description: Portable TypeScript guardrail + agent harness for Claude Code

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Guardrails R01-R13, 6 agents (worker / reviewer / scaffolder / security-auditor / codex-sync / coderabbit-mimic), 13 commands (5 verb skills + 8 workflow skills), 13 lifecycle hook events, zero native dependencies. `codex-sync` / `coderabbit-mimic` agents invoke the companion `openai-codex` plugin when present — install it for full functionality.
